#  Export RFIs from a Bid Room in Portfolio Financials 
#####  Legacy
This information is intended for accounts with [Portfolio Financials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/) product in Procore. Please reach out to your Procore point of contact for more information.
##  Background 
The RFIs page in the Bid Room is a powerful tool that allows you to manage RFIs from your vendors and keep information consistent across all bidders. RFIs in a Bid Room can be exported to an XLS file.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions** :
    * 'Vendor' access to the project or higher.  
_Note:_ Users can only export RFIs for a Bid Room they have access to.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the **Bid Room** you want to export RFIs from.
  2. Click the **RFIs** tab.
  3. Click **XLS**.  
  
![Xls](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/ea4a77f038bd66dc2a87485c06963506/7bc01ff72f9e40b3595945944be9aacb/xls.png?fm=webp)  
  
_Note:_ The file will begin downloading to your computer.


## See Also
  * [Best Practices for Bid Room Collaborators in Portfolio Financials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/tutorials/best-practices-for-bid-room-collaborators-in-portfolio-financials)
  * [Portfolio Financials - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/permissions)
  * [Restore a Deleted RFI in Portfolio Financials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/tutorials/restore-a-deleted-rfi-in-portfolio-financials)
title: Export RFIs from a Bid Room in Portfolio Financials
description: How to export RFIs from a Bid Room in Portfolio Financials to an XLS file.
